---
title: "*Calepin* Slides"
date: 2026-03-19
format: revealjs
---

::: {.callout-tip}
Click the `</>` button in the top navigation bar to view the original `.qmd` source code.
:::

## What is *Calepin*?

A Rust CLI that renders `.qmd` documents to HTML, LaTeX, Typst, and Markdown.

- Embeds R via extendr
- Citations via hayagriva
- WASM plugin system

## Code Chunks

```{r}
x <- rnorm(100)
summary(x)
```

## Math

The Pythagorean theorem: $a^2 + b^2 = c^2$.

Display math:

$$
\int_0^1 x^2 \, dx = \frac{1}{3}
$$

## Plugins

Extend *Calepin* with `.wasm` files:

- **txtfmt**: inline text styling
- **imgur**: image upload
- **revealjs**: these slides!

Custom formats via `_calepin/formats/revealjs.yaml`:

```yaml
base: html
extension: html
plugin: revealjs
```

## Thank You

Source: [github.com/vincentarelbundock/calepin](https://github.com/vincentarelbundock/calepin)
